violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. RIFSM has expired. Establishment must re-apply for a RIFSM. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The gasket/lid on the basement chest freezer was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The chest freezer and 1-door reach-in freezer were observed with an accumulation of ice build up. Establishment is to run a defrost on both units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The gaskets located in the prep unit, and pizza dough station was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by chemical spray bottles. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, pizza slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The two-door refrigerator was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit along with TCS food items. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed. Establishment placed fridge out of order, all product to go into walk in. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Deli meat, and pasta was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024
The gaskets located in the prep unit, and pizza dough station was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2024
The hood system has an accumulation of debris, hood systems must remain clean to sight and touch New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
